title: Custom Spawn [BTW Addon]
description: Configure your ideal initial Spawn location !
body:
# Custom Spawn (BTW:CE Addon)
![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b79b0e4eefbccccaf426b029858990786b7c3d6.png)
This addon allow you to choose **biomes preference for your Spawn** as in, biomes you (don't) want in your Spawn. 

## The way it works

By providing your preferences, the addon will scan the current seed to find a location fulfilling them and will then move Spawn to there.

Everything can be modified inside the world creation screen

Criteria :
- suitable biomes list: biomes in which the player *can spawn* in
- wanted biomes in spawn: biomes that *should be present* in Spawn's chunks
- unwanted biomes in spawn: biomes that *shouldn't be present* in Spawn's chunks

It is also possible to choose a biome that you only want to spawn in (it will then ignore the whitelist) 
For example if I enter "Forest", the addon will only spawn me inside a forest (can fail)

The searching range can also be increased (increased by default)

The suitable biomes list can also be set to affect hardcore respawn (off by default)

## Supported languages:
- English
- Chinese (thanks to Eternity)

## Found a bug or have suggestions ?

https://github.com/BTW-Community/Custom-Spawn/issues

## Download: 
https://modrinth.com/project/custom-spawn-btw-addon/versions
